attempts.test_code:
from source import quicksort

def test_quicksort_duplicates():
    arr = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    expected = [1, 2, 3, 3]
    result = quicksort(arr)
    assert result == expected, (
        f"quicksort({arr}) returned {result} (length {len(result)}) "
        f"instead of {expected} (length {len(expected)}). "
        "Bug: elements equal to pivot are dropped because the 'greater' partition uses x > pivot instead of x >= pivot."
    )
